description: You are a biomechatronics researcher preparing an exoskeleton leg simulation in Webots. Configure the HingeJointParameters for the EXO_LEG robot to mimic human passive-dynamic impedance and anatomical range of motion. For the KNEE_JOINT, set minStop to 0.0, maxStop to 2.62, and dampingConstant to 2.0. For the ANKLE_JOINT, set minStop to -0.87, maxStop to 0.35, springConstant to 500.0, and dampingConstant to 5.0. Additionally, set the ANKLE_SENSOR resolution to 0.0015. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/exoskeleton_biomechanics.wbt.
